about.seoDescription: universum. is a comprehensive platform for supporting children's development. PPC automation, development cards, analytics for educators, organizations and parents.
about.heroSubtitle: universum. is a platform that brings together educators, organizations and parents to comprehensively support every child's development.
about.missionText: Make high-quality developmental support accessible to every child in Russia by freeing educators from paperwork.

care.title: Care for every child
care.description: We build tools that help educators spend more time with children, not paperwork.

security.title: Data security
security.description: Compliance with FZ-152, hosting in Russia, encryption, and strict access control over personal data.

team.title: Teamwork
team.description: We unite educators, organizations and parents in a single space for effective collaboration.

evidence.title: Evidence-based approach
evidence.description: Methods endorsed by the Ministry of Health, compliance with DONM Order No. 666, scientifically grounded assessment tools.

faq.a1: Yes — the Free plan is available without time limits. Paid plans can be tried free for 14 days.
faq.a2: Bank transfer for organizations or card for individual specialists. Monthly and annual subscriptions are available.
faq.a3: Yes, you can change your plan at any time. When upgrading, the difference is calculated automatically.
faq.a4: All data is stored on servers in Russia in compliance with FZ-152. We use encryption and regular backups.

patents.cardTitle: AIS PPC — psychological and pedagogical council module
patents.description: AIS PPC is a component of the universum. platform that handles maintenance of psychological and pedagogical council protocols, generation of conclusions and storage of student examination results. The software has been deposited with JSC "National Intellectual Property Registry" (NRIS) and registered with the Russian Centre for the Turnover of Rights in Creative Activity (RCIC). The certificate confirms authorship and development priority.

documents.seoTitle: Certification and security — FZ-152, UZ-1, Cloud.ru | universum.
documents.seoDescription: universum. security documents and certificates: compliance with FZ-152 (UZ-1), hosting in Tier III data centres, FSTEC certificates. Protection of children's personal data.
documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Certifications, licences and regulatory compliance of the platform
documents.introPrefix: universum. infrastructure is hosted on the
documents.introSuffix: platform, which includes a multi-layered information protection system meeting Russian legislation and global cybersecurity best practices.
documents.cert1Desc: The Cloud.ru Evolution platform is certified at UZ-1 — the maximum level of personal data protection under Federal Law No. 152-FZ "On Personal Data". Certificates are issued by the relevant authorities and confirm full infrastructure compliance.
documents.cert2Desc: The data centres hosting the platform meet Uptime Institute Tier III Design, Tier III Facility and Tier III Operation standards — guaranteeing fault tolerance and availability.
documents.licensesIntro: Cloud.ru holds licences issued by the relevant regulators for telecommunications services and for working with various means of confidential information protection.

licenses.l4Scope: Development, production and distribution of cryptographic tools, information and telecommunications systems
licenses.l6Scope: Development and production of confidential information protection tools

documents.clientNote: Compliance of the Evolution cloud platform with regulations and the presence of certificates does not relieve the client of the obligation to carry out attestations and certifications of their own infrastructure built on top of the cloud platform, where required.

partnership.title: PUBLIC OFFER FOR THE PARTNER PROGRAM
partnership.intro1: This document is a public offer by Sole Proprietor V.S. Zagladin (TIN: 770702169499, OGRNIP: 323774600132891 — hereinafter the "Company") to enter into a partnership agreement on the terms set out below with any individual or legal entity wishing to participate in the Company's partner program (hereinafter the "Partner").
partnership.intro2: In accordance with Article 435 and Clause 2 of Article 437 of the Civil Code of the Russian Federation, acceptance of this offer constitutes the conclusion of a cooperation agreement between the Company and the Partner on the terms set out in this document.
partnership.s1p1: 1.1. The Company gives the Partner the opportunity to participate in a partner program promoting digital solutions presented at profilaktika.site (hereinafter the "Product"), including but not limited to social and psychological assessments, educational courses, analytical reports and other digital services.
partnership.s1p2: 1.2. The Partner undertakes to attract new customers (buyers) to the Product using individual referral links, promo codes or other identifying tags provided by the Company.
partnership.s1p3: 1.3. As remuneration, the Partner receives a percentage of the confirmed payment made by the customer they referred (CPS — Cost Per Sale model).
partnership.s2p1: 2.1. The remuneration is between 10% and 30% of the order value, depending on the product type and sale conditions.
partnership.s2p2: 2.2. Remuneration is paid only for confirmed and paid orders. An order is considered confirmed if:
partnership.s2l3: The payment has passed verification (including refund and fraud checks).
partnership.s2p3: 2.3. Payment duration: the Partner receives remuneration for all payments made by the customer (including subscriptions, repeat payments and renewals).
partnership.s2l4: CPS (percentage of sale) — the standard model;
partnership.s2l5: RevShare (revenue share) — for subscriptions and long-term products;
partnership.s2l6: Fixed payout per lead — by separate agreement for specific products.
partnership.s3p1: 3.1. Promote the Product in good faith, in compliance with the laws of the Russian Federation and the countries where advertising is conducted.
partnership.s3p2: 3.2. Use only official referral links, promo codes and marketing materials provided by the Company.
partnership.s3p3: 3.3. Do not use the following methods:
partnership.s3l4: Infringement of third-party rights (including copyrights and trademarks).
partnership.s3p4: 3.4. Do not create sites imitating profilaktika.site and do not present yourself as a Company representative without consent.
partnership.s4l1: Tracking and accounting of all clicks, leads and sales via referral links;
partnership.s4l2: Technical support for the partner program.
partnership.s4p2: 4.2. Accrue remuneration monthly based on the previous month's results, after a 30-day hold.
partnership.s4p3: 4.3. Make payouts within 10 business days after the end of the settlement period to the details specified by the Partner (bank account, e-wallets, etc.).
partnership.s4p4: 4.4. Maintain confidentiality of the Partner's data and not transfer it to third parties without consent.
partnership.s5p1: 5.1. This agreement enters into force upon the Partner's registration in the partner program and is open-ended.
partnership.s5p2: 5.2. Either party may terminate the agreement unilaterally by notifying the other party in writing (including by email) 10 calendar days in advance.
partnership.s5l1: Accrued but unpaid amounts are paid out as usual;
partnership.s5l2: New clicks and sales after the termination date are not counted.
partnership.s6p1: 6.1. The parties undertake not to disclose confidential information (including data on the partner program, rates, customers) obtained during the cooperation.
partnership.s6p2: 6.2. Information may be disclosed only at the request of authorities or as part of judicial proceedings.
partnership.s7p1: 7.1. Each party is responsible for the accuracy of the information provided and for compliance with the terms of this agreement.
partnership.s7p2: 7.2. The Company is not liable for:
partnership.s7l1: Partner losses related to changes in program terms (provided 30-day notice is given);
partnership.s7l2: Technical failures beyond the Company's control;
partnership.s7l3: Actions of third parties (payment systems, hosting providers, etc.).
partnership.s7p3: 7.3. The Partner is independently responsible for tax law compliance in their country.
partnership.s8p1: 8.1. The Company may amend this offer provided it notifies Partners at least 30 days before the changes take effect (via email, personal notice or on the website).
partnership.s8p2: 8.2. Continued participation in the program after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the new terms by the Partner.
partnership.s9p1: 9.1. This agreement is governed by the laws of the Russian Federation.
partnership.s9p2: 9.2. All disputes are resolved through negotiations; if no agreement is reached — in court at the Company's location.
partnership.acceptText: Registration in the partner program means full and unconditional acceptance by the Partner of the terms of this public offer.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Briefly about regulations, security and pricing

items.q: Does the platform comply with Moscow Department of Education Order No. 666?
items.a: Yes. All PPC protocol forms, checklists and conclusions are built strictly per Order No. 666 of the Moscow Department of Education and Science. Templates are updated regularly with regulatory changes.

items.q: Where is children's personal data stored?
items.a: Data is stored only on SberCloud servers in the Moscow region, security level UZ‑1 per Government Decree No. 1119. The platform is registered with Roskomnadzor as a personal data operator and supports Row-Level Security, two-factor authentication and trusted IP filtering.

items.q: Can an individual specialist join, rather than a whole organization?
items.a: Yes. Psychologists, speech therapists and defectologists in private practice can work in their personal account for 330 RUB per month — with child cards, scheduling, diagnostics and online payments by parents.

items.q: How long are protocols and conclusions retained?
items.a: At least 5 years, as required by Order No. 666. Documents export to PDF/DOCX/Excel with Cyrillic support and remain available in the organization's archive at any time.

Full access to all system modules for 14 days with no card required: PPC, scheduling, diagnostics, reports, child cards. Just submit a request — the administrator activates access within a business day.

items.q: Is there integration with EKIS / Moscow DOE organization registry?
items.a: Yes. The list of Moscow educational organizations syncs with EKIS automatically. For other regions organizations are added manually or via API.

items.q: Can the system be installed on our own servers (on-premise)?
items.a: Yes, we support on-premise deployment for large educational holdings and regional operators. Contact us via the demo request form.
